parameters.query: SELECT t.*, t.name AS tenant_name FROM tenants t WHERE t.phone LIKE '%' || '{{ $json.phone }}' || '%' LIMIT 1

parameters.text:
Registration successful! You are now linked to your tenant account.

You can send us messages, photos, or videos about any maintenance issues.

parameters.query: SELECT t.*, t.name AS tenant_name, t.phone, t.unit_number, t.email, p.address AS property, t.emergency_contact, t.telegram_id, t.language_pref FROM tenants t LEFT JOIN properties p ON t.property_id = p.id WHERE CASE WHEN '{{ $json.channel }}' = 'email' THEN LOWER(t.email) = LOWER('{{ $json.sender_identifier.replace(/'/g, "''") }}') WHEN '{{ $json.channel }}' = 'sms' THEN t.phone LIKE '%' || '{{ $json.sender_identifier.replace(/'/g, "''") }}' || '%' WHEN '{{ $json.channel }}' = 'telegram' THEN t.telegram_id = '{{ $json.sender_identifier.replace(/'/g, "''") }}' WHEN '{{ $json.channel }}' = 'whatsapp' THEN t.phone LIKE '%' || RIGHT('{{ $json.sender_identifier.replace(/'/g, "''") }}', 10) || '%' END LIMIT 1

INSERT INTO messages (chat_id, message_id, telegram_id, sender, message_text, channel, created_at, external_message_id) VALUES ('{{ ($json.norm_chat_id || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}', '', '{{ ($json.telegram_id || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}', '{{ ($json.name || $json.tenant_name || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}', '{{ ($json.norm_message || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}', '{{ $json.norm_channel || '' }}', NOW(), '{{ ($json.norm_ext_id || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}') ON CONFLICT (external_message_id) WHERE external_message_id != '' DO NOTHING RETURNING *

parameters.content:
## [Intake] Channel Router

Receives messages from all channels, normalizes into standard format, deduplicates, looks up tenant, hands off to AI Agent.

Channels: Email, Telegram, WhatsApp, SMS
Future: ElevenLabs Voice

## Registration Flow
/start command -> extract phone -> save telegram_id -> welcome

parameters.query: SELECT vendor_name, email, phone FROM vendors WHERE LOWER(category) LIKE LOWER('%{{ $json.category }}%') LIMIT 10
SELECT ticket_id, category, summary, description, property, unit, unit_number FROM maintenance_requests WHERE ticket_id = '{{ $('Parse Callback').item.json.ticket_id }}' LIMIT 1

messageValues.message: You are writing a brief service request email. ONLY use the information provided below - do NOT add any details, speculations, or assumptions. Write exactly: 1) Greeting to the vendor by name 2) State you are Julia from Julia Inc property management 3) State ONLY the issue as described 4) State the address and unit 5) Ask for earliest availability. Maximum 4 sentences. Do NOT mention neighboring units, potential causes, or any information not explicitly provided. Sign as Julia.

parameters.query: SELECT vendor_name, email, phone FROM vendors WHERE LOWER(category) LIKE LOWER('%{{ $json.category }}%') LIMIT 10
SELECT vendor_name, email, phone FROM vendors WHERE LOWER(category) LIKE LOWER('%{{ $json.category }}%') OFFSET {{ $json.vendor_index || 0 }} LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM maintenance_requests WHERE ticket_id = '{{ $('Parse Callback').item.json.ticket_id }}' LIMIT 1

messageValues.message: You are writing a brief service request email. ONLY use the information provided below - do NOT add any details, speculations, or assumptions. Write exactly: 1) Greeting to the vendor by name 2) State you are Julia from Julia Inc property management 3) State ONLY the issue as described 4) State the address and unit 5) Ask for earliest availability. Maximum 4 sentences. Do NOT mention neighboring units, potential causes, or any information not explicitly provided. Sign as Julia.

parameters.name: text
parameters.value: =Dispatched! Email sent to {{ $('Confirm Vendor').item.json.vendor_name }} at {{ $('Confirm Vendor').item.json.email }}. Ticket {{ $('Parse Callback').item.json.ticket_id }} updated.

parameters.query: DELETE FROM messages; SELECT 'messages cleared' as result;
DELETE FROM maintenance_requests; SELECT 'maintenance_requests cleared' as result;
